title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 1–9, this part focuses on the crew splits up, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. Usopp and Chopper endure brutal attacks and keep fighting for Luffy, Vivi, and the crew’s promise. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I saw the oddest panda on TV the other day. You know how normal Panda have black spots? Well this one didn't. It was quite a sight to see. Apparently, it lived somewhere up near the Arctic too. Haha, guess that Panda just couldn't help it. In any case,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: * Z*C-C is

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Ughh!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: CLICK!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: This is a battlefield! Stop worrying about such trivialities!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Is the bullet wound from Nanohana still hurting Y-

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: In any case, I need to get myself a horse! If I can just make it out of the town center, I can then head to the Northern Block where the palace is!

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: The PALACE? What're you planning' to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: I'm going to demand a surrender from the king.

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: That's crazy! The Northern Block is guarded by the bulk of the Royal Army, not to mention Poll and Chaka!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Most of us rebels haven't even arrived yet! We still have reinforcements coming in from the other towns!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: There's no need for you to risk going in deep alone!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: ...It's already too late.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Lend me a hand!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: LEAP!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Halt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you one of the rebels!?

summary: This part develops the crew splits up and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
